title: Set up Recharts for data visualization
summary: Add interactive, responsive charts to a React/Next.js app using Recharts — bar, line, area, and pie charts with custom tooltips and legends.
declaration: I will add Recharts to this project and implement the charts you need — bar, line, area, or pie. All charts will be responsive and work in Client Components. If you need a specific chart type not covered here, tell me the shape of your data and what you want to visualise.
